svg.title: Kevin Cusnir’s journey from San Cristóbal to Beersheba
svg.desc: An animated Natural Earth world atlas representing 195 sovereign states with boundary features, source tiny-state markers and supplemental centroid markers, highlighting Kevin’s birthplace in San Cristóbal, Venezuela, his current base in Beersheba, Israel, and Spanish, English and Hebrew communication.
svg.metadata: Natural Earth v5.1.1; 177 boundary features; 37 source tiny-country markers; 13 supplemental sovereign-centroid markers; 195 sovereign states represented (182 from pinned sources); public-domain geography.
svg.text: Venezuelan roots · Israeli home · global collaboration
195 SOVEREIGN STATES REPRESENTED / TINY STATES MARKED
